name: coding-python
description: Practical Python project setup + everyday development tasks. Supports existing repo toolchains (uv/poetry/pip) and can scaffold a new pyproject.toml-based project.

interface.shortDescription: Use practical Python project setup and development workflows.
interface.longDescription: Set up Python projects, work with existing uv, Poetry, or pip toolchains, add dependencies, run tests, format and lint code, and scaffold pyproject.toml-based projects.
defaultPrompt: Use Coding Python to set up this project.
Use Coding Python to add tests and run the Python toolchain.
Use Coding Python to scaffold a new pyproject.toml project.
